creator: hoek@hwcn.org
text:
On Sat, 23 May 1998, Hans Petter Bieker wrote:

> > Gee, not to cramp anyone's style, but can we please just say
> > "extremely" or "exceeding" instead... 
> 
> i know, but why are you bashing me?

I'm not.  I know you copied it from the README, but when I hit
the [R]reply key, your email address somehow appeared in the To:
header.  :-)

FWIW, I'd consider it fine style for a README that is read only
by hackers, anyways.


> [.. configure..]
> # This configure script is free software; the Free Software Foundation
> # gives unlimited permission to copy, distribute and modify it.
> [..]

That smells like GNU_CONFIGURE.  I suspect you don't even need
the CONFIGURE_ENV=INSTALL_SCRIPT="${INSTALL_SCRIPT}" line at all.


--
Outnumbered?  Maybe.  Outspoken?  Never!
tIM...HOEk
